scripts.dev: concurrently "next dev" "cd ai-router && npm install && set PORT=20128&& npm run dev"
scripts.build: NEXT_PRIVATE_STANDALONE=true next build && opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipNextBuild --openNextConfigPath open-next.config.mjs && cd ai-router && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently "next start" "cd ai-router && set PORT=20128&& npm run start"
